name: Vercel Analytics
description: Read Vercel Analytics / Speed Insights / Audience data via the Vercel API. 4 tools, Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Vercel Platform API (vercel.com/docs/rest-api).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://vercel.com → top-right avatar → **Settings → Tokens → Create Token**.
2. Pick scope (account-level or team-level). Set `VERCEL_ACCESS_TOKEN`.
3. For team-scoped queries also set `VERCEL_TEAM_ID` (visible in Team Settings).

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${VERCEL_ACCESS_TOKEN}`.

**Note**: Vercel's Web Analytics + Speed Insights data endpoints went through major changes in 2024-2025. Some endpoints are paywall/plan-gated. The adapter uses the stable public endpoints; some analytics queries require Pro+ plan.

**Pagination**: cursor-based via `until` Unix ms (return items older than this).

**Out of scope here**: deployments/builds CRUD (large surface, separate connector if needed), Edge Config, KV/Postgres data, Edge Functions logs.

tools.name: vercel_analytics_get_user
tools.description: Return the user the token belongs to.

tools.name: vercel_analytics_list_projects
tools.description: List projects in the team / account.

tools.name: vercel_analytics_get_deployments
tools.description: List deployments for a project. Returns each deployment's url, state, source, created.

state.description: BUILDING, ERROR, INITIALIZING, QUEUED, READY, CANCELED.

tools.name: vercel_analytics_get_speed_insights
tools.description: Get Speed Insights (Core Web Vitals) data for a project — requires Vercel Speed Insights enabled on the project + Pro plan.
